verses.text: Laws of offerings for when they enter the land. Offerings. God assures them of the land.
Laws of offerings for when they enter the land. Offerings. God assures them of the land.
Laws of offerings for when they enter the land. Offerings. God assures them of the land.

Meat and drink offerings accompany a ram. Measures. Worship has its order.
Meat and drink offerings accompany a ram. Measures. Worship has its order.
Meat and drink offerings accompany a ram. Measures. Worship has its order.
Meat and drink offerings accompany a ram. Measures. Worship has its order.
So it is done for every beast that is offered. Each gift. Every offering has its portion.
So it is done for every beast that is offered. Each gift. Every offering has its portion.
So it is done for every beast that is offered. Each gift. Every offering has its portion.
One law for the home-born and the stranger. One law. The stranger shares the covenant.
One law for the home-born and the stranger. One law. The stranger shares the covenant.
One law for the home-born and the stranger. One law. The stranger shares the covenant.
One law for the home-born and the stranger. One law. The stranger shares the covenant.
They shall offer a cake of the first of their dough. Firstfruits. The first is given to God.
They shall offer a cake of the first of their dough. Firstfruits. The first is given to God.

For sins of ignorance, the congregation offers a bullock. Ignorance. Even unwitting sin is atoned.
For sins of ignorance, the congregation offers a bullock. Ignorance. Even unwitting sin is atoned.

For sins of ignorance, the congregation offers a bullock. Ignorance. Even unwitting sin is atoned.
For sins of ignorance, the congregation offers a bullock. Ignorance. Even unwitting sin is atoned.
For one soul's ignorant sin, a she-goat is brought. Atonement. The individual too is provided for.
For one soul's ignorant sin, a she-goat is brought. Atonement. The individual too is provided for.
For one soul's ignorant sin, a she-goat is brought. Atonement. The individual too is provided for.
He that sins presumptuously is cut off. Presumption. Defiant sin has no offering.
He that sins presumptuously is cut off. Presumption. Defiant sin has no offering.
A sabbath-breaker is stoned at God's command. Sabbath. The day is not despised.
A sabbath-breaker is stoned at God's command. Sabbath. The day is not despised.

They wear fringes to remember the commandments. Fringes. A token keeps God's law in mind.
